title: ToolSense: A Diagnostic Framework for Auditing Parametric Tool Knowledge in LLMs
summary: ToolSense is a diagnostic framework to audit and evaluate how LLMs internally encode parametric knowledge about tools, addressing the tool-retrieval bottleneck in agent systems.
chinese_summary: ToolSense是一个诊断框架，用于审计和评估LLM如何内部编码关于工具的参数量知识，解决代理系统中的工具检索瓶颈问题。
